mapper.select:
SELECT T1.NOTE_ID, T1.UNION_NO, T1.WEIGH_IN_DT, T1.CHECKER_IN_NAME, T1.WEIGH_OUT_DT, T1.CHECKER_OUT_NAME, T1.INV_NO, T1.PLAN_NO, T1.GOODS_NAME, T1.GOODS_DES, T1.TRUCK_PLATE, T1.WEIGH_NUMBERYPE, T1.WEIGH_OUTTYPE, T1.WEIGHT_SELF*1000 as "weighSelf", T1.WEIGHT_ALL*1000 as "weighAll", T1.WEIGHT_GOODS*1000 as "weighGoods", T1.COM_NAME, T1.COM_NO, T1.IS_DELETE, T1.IS_FINISHED, T1.INV_REM, T1.CON_UNIT, T1.REC_UNIT, T1.AGENT_NAME, T1.TSPT_ID, T1.WORK_ERWEI_ID, T1.ID_NUMBER, T1.IN_BANG_NO, T1.OUT_BANG_NO, T1.PORT_CODE, T1.SCN, CASE WHEN T2.TALLY_STATUS = 9 THEN 'KA08' WHEN T1.TRADE_TYP = '内贸' THEN 'MY01' WHEN T1.TRADE_TYP = '外贸' THEN 'MY02' ELSE '' END TRADE_TYPE FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND T1 LEFT JOIN T_YARD_TALLY T2 ON T1.NOTE_ID = T2.WEIGHBRIDGE_ID AND T2.DEL_FLAG = 0
T1.UNION_NO = #{unionNo}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT T1.NOTE_ID, T1.UNION_NO, T1.WEIGH_IN_DT, T1.CHECKER_IN_NAME, T1.WEIGH_OUT_DT, T1.CHECKER_OUT_NAME, T1.INV_NO, T1.PLAN_NO, T1.GOODS_NAME, T1.GOODS_DES, T1.TRUCK_PLATE, T1.WEIGH_NUMBERYPE, T1.WEIGH_OUTTYPE, T1.WEIGHT_SELF*1000 as "weighSelf", T1.WEIGHT_ALL*1000 as "weighAll", T1.WEIGHT_GOODS*1000 as "weighGoods", T1.COM_NAME, T1.COM_NO, T1.IS_DELETE, T1.IS_FINISHED, T1.INV_REM, T1.CON_UNIT, T1.REC_UNIT, T1.AGENT_NAME, T1.TSPT_ID, T1.WORK_ERWEI_ID, T1.ID_NUMBER, T1.IN_BANG_NO, T1.OUT_BANG_NO, T1.PORT_CODE, T1.SCN, CASE WHEN T1.TRADE_TYP = '内贸' THEN 'MY01' WHEN T1.TRADE_TYP = '外贸' THEN 'MY02' ELSE '' END TRADE_TYPE FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND T1
T1.PLAN_NO = #{informno} AND T1.TRUCK_PLATE = #{truckno} AND '02' = T1.PORT_CODE
ORDER BY T1.WEIGH_IN_DT DESC WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT COUNT(NOTE_ID) COUNT FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO
TSPT_ID = #{taskNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_FTD_LOG( LOG_TYPE, TITLE, CONTENT, ERR_MSG )VALUES ( #{logType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errMsg, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

INSERT INTO WFG_GCTOS_POUND.CUSTOMS_LOG( SEQ_NO, POUND_NO, SEND_TEXT, RECEIVE_TEXT, REC_TIM, UPD_TIM, GATE_NO, RELEASE, REASON, IO_FLAG )VALUES ( #{seqNo}, #{poundNo}, #{sendText}, #{receiveText}, #{recTim}, #{updTim}, #{gateNo}, #{release}, #{reason}, #{ioFlag} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM WFG_GCTOS_POUND.CUSTOMS_LOG WHERE GATE_NO = #{gateNo} AND IO_FLAG = #{state} ORDER BY UPD_TIM DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT A .* FROM T_BUS_VEHICLE_TRANSFER A, T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO b WHERE A .TRUST_CARGO_ID = b. ID AND b.BUSINESS_NO = #{informno} AND A .EQUIPMENT_NO = #{truckno} AND A .STATUS = '1'
SELECT * FROM T_BUS_VEHICLE_RESERVATION WHERE PLAN_NO = #{informno} AND VEHICLE_NO = #{truckno} AND STATUS = '0' AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A .* FROM T_YARD_TALLY A, T_YARD_TALLY_ITEM B, T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO D WHERE A .TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_NO = #{truckno} AND A . ID = B.TALLY_ID AND B.CARGO_INFO_ID = D .CARGO_INFO_ID AND D .BUSINESS_NO = #{informno} AND A .DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY A .CREATE_TIME DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT * FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL tppsd WHERE CARGO_TALLY_DETAIL_ID = #{cargoTallyDetailId}
mapper.update: UPDATE T_BUS_VEHICLE_RESERVATION SET ACTIVATION_STATE = '0' where TASK_NO = #{taskNo} and ACTIVATION_STATE = '1'
UPDATE T_WEIGHT_PLAN_ITEM SET ACTIVATION_STATE = '0' where TRUCK_NO = #{truckPlate} and ACTIVATION_STATE = '1'
